description: Single source of truth for CI homogeneity: webkit-pin tarball must match webkit.expectedCommit; Dawn pin is dawn.vcpkgBaseline (must match config/vcpkg-configuration.json); shared CMake toggles are emitted by config/ci_matrix_env.py into GITHUB_ENV on each workflow run.

upstream.tracking: Track official WebKit main. expectedCommit remains the tested source pin until a head-bump branch passes patch checks and platform CI.

dawn.notes: Windows only: Dawn comes from vcpkg port 'webgpu_dawn' at the pinned registry baseline. Keep config/vcpkg-configuration.json aligned with this baseline; bump Dawn with the WebKit pin only after the Windows WebGPU harness and WebKit patch stack are revalidated. macOS/iOS/Linux GTK builds use the WebKit port defaults unless you add port-specific WebGPU flags.
